results.title: Ariana Grande reschedules 2 concerts at TD Garden in Boston
results.description: Ariana Grande has announced she is rescheduling two of her shows at TD Garden in Boston.

results.title: Kris Bernal, Chariz Solomon crowned as Queen Ambassadresses at Mrs.Universe Philippines 2026
results.description: StarStruck season 4 stars Kris Bernal and Chariz Solomon enjoy their beauty queen moment at the Mrs. Universe Philippines 2026. During the dazzling coronation night, both actresses took the stage to be recognized as the pageant's Queen Ambassadors. Presented with sashes, bouquets, and sparkling crowns, Kris and Chariz were honored for their commitment to advocating for breastfeeding, maternal wellness, and empowering mothers to thrive in every role they choose. Joining the Kapuso stars were actresses Kitkat Favia and Nathalie Hart, who were also recognized as Queen Ambassadors. Take a look at some of Kris Bernal and Chariz Solomon's photos from the coronation night in this gallery.
